title: Tax Executive
description:
Working hours:  9am - 5.45pm (Mon-Fri)

Mode: In office

Salary Range: Up to $5,000.00

The Tax Executive will play a key role in supporting the Company’s Singapore tax compliance and reporting activities, ensuring adherence to corporate income tax, GST, and withholding tax requirements. This role provides comprehensive support across tax filings, analysis, audits, and financial reporting, while collaborating closely with internal teams and external advisors. The ideal candidate possesses strong technical tax knowledge, a solid accounting foundation, and the ability to work independently with precision and professionalism. This position is fully on-site in Singapore and may involve periodic overseas assignments to support the organization’s global operations

Responsibilities

·       Prepare corporate income tax and withholding tax (WHT) returns for the company’s Singapore entities, ensuring compliance with local tax regulations and filing deadlines.

·       Manage the preparation and submission of Goods and Services Tax (GST) returns and address any related inquiries from tax authorities.

·       Assist to prepare deferred tax computations, tax provisions, and related disclosures as part of the month-end and year-end closing processes.

·       Support internal accounting teams in providing accurate tax data, reconciliations, and analysis for financial and management reporting.

·       Liaise with external tax advisors and service providers, ensuring that information and deliverables are presented in a comprehensive and professional manner.

·       Prepare responses and supporting documentation for tax audits, reviews, or queries raised by tax authorities.

·       Conduct research on updates and amendments to tax legislation, both locally and internationally, and assess their potential impact on the organization.

·       Assist the Tax Manager on ad-hoc tax projects or initiatives aimed at improving tax governance and efficiency across entities.

Requirements

•                   Degree in Accounting, Finance, Taxation, or a related discipline.

•                   A minimum of 3 to 5 years of relevant experience in corporate tax compliance advisory, preferably gained within a commercial or multinational environment.

•                   Strong technical understanding of Singapore tax laws, including corporate income tax, withholding tax, and GST.

•                   Knowledge in dealing with internal accountants is also preferred

•                   Knowledge or exposure to international tax jurisdictions, such as China, European jurisdictions, or the United States, will be an added advantage.

•                   Accounting background or familiarity with financial accounting and month-end processes is beneficial.

•                   Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel with the capability to perform complex tax analyses, computations, and reconciliations.

•                   Possesses strong analytical, communication, and interpersonal skills, with an ability to work collaboratively across departments and with external stakeholders.

•                   Demonstrated ability to work independently while maintaining a high level of accuracy and attention to detail.

•                   The candidate may be required to travel periodically or be assigned to work in overseas entities to support the organization’s global operations.

Please submit your updated resume in Word format by using the Apply Now Button.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Email resume to Sherry.Yeoh@peopleprofilers.com
